title: copy(??) latest github.com/docker/distribution/reference to support ipv6
body: docker image support ipv6, but containers/image don't support it, copy latest [reference](https://github.com/distribution/reference) to support it.

comments.body: Please follow containers/image#2618 for the discussion.
If nothing else, we are already using the `[…]` syntax for `containers-storage:` store options, so this probably introduces an ambiguity. This needs a careful compatibility analysis.
